description_long: This is a single-story wooden cabin with a wide, overhanging gable roof finished in a muted red color. The structure features a full-length covered porch supported by slender posts, running along the longer sides of the building. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet orderly appearance. There is a single set of steps leading up to the porch and a main entrance door, accompanied by a few rectangular windows of varying sizes, some with visible shutters or coverings. A metal chimney protrudes from the roof, suggesting the presence of a fireplace or stove inside. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for residential or retreat purposes in an urban or semi-urban setting.
description: A wooden cabin with a red gable roof, full-length porch, and a few windows and doors, exuding a rustic and functional charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full-length porch, main entrance, and a wide expanse of the red gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steps leading to the porch, a door, and a window, with the roof's overhang clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch area, a window, and the continuation of the roof and wooden siding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch, a window, and the metal chimney emerging from the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wide overhangs and a single metal chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical arrangement with a few medium-sized rectangular windows distributed on the visible sides, some with coverings or shutters
attribute_door_placement: one main exterior door located on the side with the steps, opening onto the porch
